20.reason: The loop condition should be t <= str[i+1]-str[i-1]-1, but more importantly, the code does not check if str[i+1] > str[i-1] before expanding. For input "B-e", str[i-1]='B' and str[i+1]='e', they are not the same type (uppercase vs lowercase), so the condition fails and the '-' is not copied to ans, causing it to be lost.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  If str[i+1] <= str[i-1], this loop may not execute but the hyphen is still omitted; need to ensure str[i+1] > str[i-1] before expanding.

25.reason: Missing else branch: when expansion condition fails, the '-' character should be added to ans.

18.reason: Missing check that str[i+1] > str[i-1]; also, when this condition is false, the code does nothing, so the '-' is omitted. Should copy '-' to ans.
